title: astracantha globiflora
intro: Astracantha globiflora, also known as the sticky thistle or globeflower, is a perennial plant in the pea family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat various conditions such as arthritis, kidney stones, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it can also be dried and used in capsule or powder form for its medicinal properties.
